title: Rainbow berry
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Rainbow_berries.jpg|thumb|250px|[[Nippet/Legends|Nippet]], [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa]], [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket]], and Wiley carry home baskets full of rainbow berries.]]
[[File:Rainbow_berry_bush.jpg|thumb|right|250px|A [[rainbow berry bush]].]]
{{Quote|Agrirobots require constant maintenance, Jawas don't know a pika fruit from a rainbow berry, and all the local kids are just daydreamers who want to be starfighter pilots.|[[Huff Darklighter]], about farming|<ref name="SWG:FC">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=terminal||Farmers' Champion}}</ref>}}
'''Rainbow berries''' were a multicolored fruits from a [[Rainbow berry bush|bush species]] that grew on the [[Endor/Legends|forest moon of Endor]]. They were used to make [[Rainbow Berry Pie|rainbow berry pies]] and [[Wistie Fest pie]]s.

One year in particular, the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] of [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]] had a shortage of rainbow berries, but [[Wokling/Legends|woklings]] [[Nippet/Legends|Nippet]] and [[Wiley (Ewok)|Wiley]] discovered a plethora of berries out in the forest just in time for the [[Harvest Moon Feast]].

==Behind the scenes==
Rainbow berries were created by author [[Melinda Luke]] and illustrator [[Pat Paris]]. The title [[Fuzzy as an Ewok: Things to See, Touch, and Smell from the Forest Moon of Endor|''Fuzzy as an Ewok'']] was a "scratch-and-sniff" book that allowed readers to experience the smell of this fruit.
